title: Enterprise Decision Intelligence
summary: How Joz turns data, knowledge, and operational signals into clearer priorities and faster decisions.
claims: Joz designs systems that distinguish material signals from organisational noise.
Decision intelligence combines retrieval, context, evidence, confidence, business impact, and recommended action.
The goal is not more dashboards but better decisions and faster execution.
proof_points: Current focus on context engineering, RAG, agent memory, retrieval, verification, and AI governance.
Long-term experience translating complex information into usable enterprise products.
Transformation work across executives, regional teams, national media, banking, and government.
